title: Politicial scientist Alexandra de Hoop Scheffer: 'Washington is pursuing a strategy of strategic saturation'
subhed: According to the president of the German Marshall Fund, the US, who is engaged on multiple fronts, is renegotiating the transatlantic contract unilaterally by pressuring its European allies to take responsibility for their own security.
